title: MappingTask
description: Represents a mapping task that executes a mapping with specific source and target connections and runtime parameters.

id.description: The unique identifier for the mapping task.

orgId.description: The organization ID that owns the task.

name.description: The name of the mapping task.

description.description: A description of the mapping task.

createTime.description: The time the mapping task was created.

updateTime.description: The time the mapping task was last updated.

createdBy.description: The user who created the mapping task.

updatedBy.description: The user who last updated the mapping task.

mappingId.description: The ID of the mapping that this task executes.

runtimeEnvironmentId.description: The runtime environment to use for execution.

scheduleId.description: The schedule ID if the task is scheduled.

preProcessingCmd.description: The command to run before the task executes.

postProcessingCmd.description: The command to run after the task executes.

parameters.description: The parameter values for this task execution. Overrides default mapping parameters.

sourceConnectionId.description: The source connection ID for the mapping task.

targetConnectionId.description: The target connection ID for the mapping task.

active.description: Whether the mapping task is active.
